channel.title: Arsenal Media Blog
channel.description: Articles about custom apps, websites, SEO, and business systems.

item.title: What a Better Contractor Website Should Actually Do
item.description: A good contractor website is not just a digital brochure. It should help people understand what you do, trust your work, and contact you fast.

item.title: Why Contractors Outgrow Spreadsheets
item.description: Spreadsheets work for a while, but contractors usually outgrow them once leads, estimates, crews, and follow-up start piling up.
